subcodes.first_line: O Prince of Princes! The meaning of "Beylerbey" in the tongue of the Turks is thus; however, 'Abdu'l-Bahá's intention regarding lordship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای میر میران معنی بیکلربیکی بلسان ترکان چنانست اما مقصد عبدالبهاء از امیری
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
